revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 30 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:12-ngie̍t 30-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:12月30日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 30일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 30 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月三十]][[zh:十二月三十]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 30|qq=December 30}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月三十|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 30일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 30''' is the 30th day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1306255}} . As with all other days 30 of the Sino-Japanese calendar it sometimes happens and sometimes does not depending on the lunar cycle.<ref>https://www.ndl.go.jp/koyomi/e/history/index.html</ref> Months are annotated as either long ({{zh|c=大|l=big|qq=}} for months with 30 days) or short ({{zh|c=小|l=small|qq=}} for months with 29 days). There are also other elements of the traditional Chinese calendar.<ref>https://web.archive.org/web/20250111081847/https://www.chinaknowledge.de/History/Terms/calendar.html</ref><ref>https://www.nippon.com/en/japan-glances/jg00122/the-japanese-calendar.html</ref> == Events == * {{ill|Ōan|en|Ōan|qid=Q1146245|lt=Ōan era|1=Ōan}} 1st Year / {{ill|Zhengping|en|Zhengping|qid=Q11123413|lt=Shōhei|1=Zhengping}} 23rd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1369|en|1369|qid=Q6211|lt=1369|1=1369}} {{ill|February 7|en|February 7|qid=Q2322|lt=February 7|1=February 7}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|en|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|qid=Q248381|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu}} assumed the position of the 3rd {{ill|Shogun|ja|将軍|lt=Shogun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shogun|1=jiangjun|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q15903946}} of the {{ill|Muromachi Shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|lt=Muromachi Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} . * {{ill|Meitoku|en|Meitoku|qid=Q1145032|lt=Meitoku|1=Meitoku}} 2nd Year / {{ill|Genchū|en|Genchū|qid=Q1146236|lt=Genchū|1=Genchū}} 8th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1392|en|1392|qid=Q6382|lt=1392|1=1392}} {{ill|January 24|en|January 24|qid=Q2278|lt=January 24|1=January 24}} ) – The {{ill|Meitoku Rebellion|ja|明徳の乱|lt=Meitoku Rebellion|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meitoku Rebellion|1=Meitoku Rebellion|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10315231}} ended. The rebellion led by the {{ill|regional military governors|ja|守護大名|lt=regional military governors|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/regional military governors|1=shugo daimyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5368717}} , {{ill|Yamana Kiyosei|ja|山名氏清|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Kiyosei|1=Ujikiyo Yamana|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11467600}} and {{ill|Yamana Mitsuyuki|ja|山名満幸|lt=Yamana Mitsuyuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana Mitsuyuki|1=Yamana Mitsuyuki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11467602}} , was crushed by the forces of {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|en|Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|qid=Q248381|lt=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu|1=Ashikaga Yoshimitsu}} . * {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|lt=Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 17th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1549|en|1549|qid=Q6554|lt=1549|1=1549}} {{ill|January 28|en|January 28|qid=Q2285|lt=January 28|1=January 28}} ) – {{ill|Nagao Kagetora|ja|長尾景虎|lt=Nagao Kagetora|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nagao Kagetora|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 上杉謙信|1=Uesugi Kenshin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q311080}} (later known as {{ill|Uesugi Kenshin|en|Uesugi Kenshin|qid=Q311080|lt=Uesugi Kenshin|1=Uesugi Kenshin}} ) succeeded his elder brother as head of the family and entered {{ill|Kasugayama Castle|en|Kasugayama Castle|qid=Q1197131|lt=Kasugayama Castle|1=Kasugayama Castle}} in {{ill|Echigo Province|ja|Echigo Province|lt=Echigo Province|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echigo Province|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} . * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 11th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|January 22|en|January 22|qid=Q2275|lt=January 22|1=January 22}} ) – The {{ill|kokugakusha|ja|Kokugakuist|1=Kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|lt=National Learning scholar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/kokugakusha|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q855159}} {{ill|Hirata Atsutane|en|Hirata Atsutane|qid=Q2572749|lt=Hirata Atsutane|1=Hirata Atsutane}} , due to his criticisms of {{ill|Confucianism|en|Confucianism|qid=Q9581|lt=Confucianism|1=Confucianism}} and his pro-Emperor ideology, was ordered by the {{ill|Edo Shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|lt=Edo Shogunate|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo Shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to cease writing and to leave Edo. == Births == * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 24|en|January 24|qid=Q2278|lt=January 24|1=January 24}} ) – {{ill|Saitō Ryokuu|en|Saitō Ryokuu|qid=Q3777938|lt=Saitō Ryokuyu|1=Saitō Ryokuu}} , a novelist and critic (died {{ill|1904|en|1904|qid=Q2046|lt=1904|1=1904}} ). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 3rd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|January 24|en|January 24|qid=Q2278|lt=January 24|1=January 24}} ) – {{ill|Tanaka Chūdō|ja|田中王堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanaka Chūdō|1=Tanaka Ōdō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11575726}} , a philosopher (died {{ill|1932|en|1932|qid=Q18743|lt=1932|1=1932}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei|1=Kan'ei}} 15th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1639|en|1639|qid=Q6897|lt=1639|1=1639}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}} ) – {{ill|Hachisuka Iemasa|en|Hachisuka Iemasa|qid=Q1073557|lt=Hachisuka Iemasa|1=Hachisuka Iemasa}} , a daimyo of the {{ill|Tokushima Domain|ja|Tokushima Domain|lt=Tokushima Domain|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokushima Domain|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (died {{ill|1558|en|1558|qid=Q6601|lt=1558|1=1558}} ). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Ōmisoka|en|Ōmisoka|qid=Q2357104|lt=New Year's Eve|1=Ōmisoka}} (if it is the final day of December)
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|29|1|1|11|30|1|12|1230|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 12월 30일]] [[ja:12月30日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月三十]]
